abort.no_calendars: No calendar entities were found. Set up a calendar in Home Assistant first.

user.title: Select waste calendar
user.description: Choose the calendar that contains your pickup appointments. The calendar will be analyzed automatically in the next step.

waste_types.title: Select calendar entries
waste_types.description: The selected calendar was scanned. Here you can see the unique entries that were found and choose which ones should trigger reminders.

settings.title: Configure notifications
settings.description: Define when reminders should be sent and in which two months automatic reminders are active.

notify_devices.title: Select devices
notify_devices.description: Choose one or more phones for push notifications. Selected devices appear as badges and disappear from the remaining dropdown list.

error.scan_failed: The calendar could not be read.
error.no_waste_types: No matching waste entries were found in the calendar.

abort.no_calendars: No calendar entities were found. Set up a calendar in Home Assistant first.

calendar.title: Select waste calendar
calendar.description: Choose another calendar if the pickup appointments are now stored in a different calendar source.

waste_types.title: Select calendar entries
waste_types.description: The selected calendar was scanned. Here you can see the unique entries and choose which ones should remain active for reminders.

settings.title: Configure notifications
settings.description: Adjust times and service months in one place.

notify_devices.title: Select devices
notify_devices.description: Choose the phones for push notifications. Selected devices appear as badges and are no longer offered in the dropdown list.

error.scan_failed: The calendar could not be read.
error.no_waste_types: No matching waste entries were found in the calendar.
